ingredients.entityContext: This hill in northern Nagasaki with views toward the Urakami Cathedral region appears in episode 9, its panoramic quality used to convey the sweeping emotional scope of Hitomi's growing connection to the era she has traveled to.

ingredients.entityContext: This local shrine appears in episode 9 as the characters explore Nagasaki's hillside neighborhoods, the small neighborhood shrine atmosphere reflecting the series' attention to the quieter, lived-in spaces of the city.
